title: 优雅关闭 (shutdown)
description: Implement graceful shutdown per ARCHITECTURE.md M103 spec. Create src/server/shutdown.js: export registerShutdown(server, hub, queue, { stopHealthCheck }). On SIGINT/SIGTERM → mark shutting_down → reject new requests with 503 → drain request queue (max 10s) → close WebSocket hub → stop health check loop → process.exit(0). ≥3 tests required. Blocked by health.js task.
